prompt: Tap the small blind seat before facing-open response.
why_v1: Small blind context drives out-of-position pressure decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Small blind context is identified.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The small blind is partly committed and still out of position, so anchor that seat first. Those two facts make its facing-open choices tighter than a freer late-position seat.
